name: Instant Snap Shot
description: Instant Snap Shot is the grey, digital version of Snap Shot who was exclusive to the Tablet Starter Pack of Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: Instant Snap Shot is the grey, digital version of Snap Shot who was exclusive to the Tablet Starter Pack of Skylanders: Trap Team. He was designed to allow players to play the game on tablets without needing to have the physical figure immediately present.
personality: As the leader of the Trap Masters, he is a stoic and focused hunter. Like the original Snap Shot, he is dedicated to protecting Skylands and capturing the escaped villains of Cloudcracker Prison.

story.content: Instant Snap Shot is the grey, digital version of Snap Shot who was exclusive to the Tablet Starter Pack of Skylanders: Trap Team. He was designed to allow players to play the game on tablets without needing to have the physical figure immediately present.

trivia: Loading Instant Snap Shot on the console versions of Skylanders: Trap Team will have the game hang on the element indefinitely. If he was to load, he would be named 'Virtual Snap Shot' instead, the internal name for instant variants.
In both Skylanders: SuperChargers and Skylanders: Imaginators he scans in as 'Snap Shot Special' and can be added to the collection as a separate Skylander.
gameplay: Instant Snap Shot plays identically to the standard Snap Shot, utilizing his Traptanium bow for ranged attacks and a sword for melee strikes. As a Trap Master, he can shatter Traptanium crystals and deals extra damage to trappable villains.

basic.name: Traptanium Arrows
basic.content: Fire arrows made of Traptanium from a great distance at enemies.

basic.name: Crystal Slam
basic.content: A powerful melee strike using a Traptanium sword to crush nearby foes.

basic_upgrades.name: Sure Shot Croc
basic_upgrades.content: Enhanced precision for the Traptanium bow, ensuring every shot counts.

basic_upgrades.name: Arrowsplosion
basic_upgrades.content: Arrows explode upon impact, dealing damage to groups of enemies.

soulgems.name: Big Wave Torrent
soulgems.content: Summon a massive torrent of water to wash away all enemies in the area.
